service_definition.description: Music streaming service — search tracks, control playback, manage playlists, get current track
endpoints: POST /spotify/search_tracks — Search tracks by query, genre, or artist (params: query, genre, artist, limit)
POST /spotify/get_track — Get a specific track by ID (params: track_id)
POST /spotify/playback_control — Control playback: play, pause, next, previous, set_volume (params: action, track_id, volume)
POST /spotify/get_current_track — Get the currently playing track and playback state (params: none)
POST /spotify/list_playlists — List all playlists, optionally filtered by owner (params: owner)
POST /spotify/create_playlist — Create a new playlist (params: name, description, track_ids, owner)
POST /spotify/update_playlist — Update an existing playlist (params: playlist_id, name, description, track_ids)
POST /spotify/delete_playlist — Delete a playlist by ID (params: playlist_id)
GET /spotify/audit — Return audit log of all API calls
POST /spotify/reset — Reset service state to fixtures
service_definition.fixture_schema: JSON object with keys: 'tracks' (array of track objects with id, title, artist, album, duration_ms, genre), 'playlists' (array of playlist objects with id, name, description, track_ids, owner), 'playback' (object with is_playing, current_track, volume)
